# Front Yard Rebel Website

This is an Astro + Tailwind CSS website for a Florida native plant gardening influencer based in Jacksonville, FL.

## Project Structure

- `src/pages/` - Astro pages (Home, About, Gallery, Resources, Contact)
- `src/components/` - Reusable Astro components
- `src/layouts/` - Page layouts
- `src/styles/` - Global CSS with Tailwind v4 theme configuration
- `public/` - Static assets (favicon, images)

## Key Features

- **Astro** - Fast static site generator
- **Tailwind CSS v4** - Utility-first CSS with custom earthy green color theme
- **Responsive design** - Mobile-first approach
- **SEO optimized** - Meta tags, Open Graph, semantic HTML
- **Easy to edit** - Content is clearly marked with placeholders

## Color Theme

The site uses a custom earthy green color palette defined in `src/styles/global.css`:
- `moss-*` - Primary green colors
- `earth-*` - Accent earth tones
- `sunset-*` - Warm accent colors

## Commands

- `npm run dev` - Start development server
- `npm run build` - Build for production
- `npm run preview` - Preview production build

## Future E-commerce

The site is structured to easily add e-commerce functionality. Recommended options:
- **Snipcart** - Easy to integrate, pay-per-transaction
- **Shopify Buy Button** - Full Shopify integration
- **Stripe** - Direct payment processing

## Hosting

Recommended free hosting options:
- **Netlify** - Deploy from Git, free tier includes forms
- **Vercel** - Excellent for static sites
- **GitHub Pages** - Free hosting from repository
